nodes.label: iPhone 16 Pro - Gold Titanium Frame PNG
nodes.source_file: Maya/Assets.xcassets/iphone frames/iPhone 16 Pro - Gold Titanium.imageset/iPhone 16 Pro - Gold Titanium.png
nodes.summary: A gold (Desert Titanium) iPhone 16 Pro device frame PNG with a fully transparent screen cutout. The device has a square triple-camera bump on the upper-left back. Frame dimensions: 450×920px. Screen cutout: 402×874px at offset (24, 23) in PNG coordinates. Used as a compositing overlay in Maya's video wrapping pipeline — the transparent screen region reveals the user's recording placed behind the frame.
